name: Tata Steel Limited
description: India's largest integrated steel producer with global operations across Europe and Asia. Known for export diversification and strong European subsidiary presence.
objectives: Maintain global export diversification across 3+ markets to reduce single-market dependency
Protect European operations during US tariff shock and preserve integrated supply chain
Preserve EBITDA margins above 15% through strategic market pivots
Sustain leadership position in Indian domestic market (18%+ market share)
constraints: Board approval required for capital expenditure exceeding $1 billion
UK operations require separate regulatory compliance and cannot be easily relocated
Debt servicing obligations limit cash deployment flexibility
European subsidiaries subject to EU trade regulations and climate mandates
